visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with a black beret and white sweater stands in a modern, well-lit indoor living space. She holds a white Labubu plush toy with a red Coca-Cola accessory and speaks enthusiastically. (2) A hand reaches into a bright refrigerator and pulls out a red blind box labeled 'The Monsters'. The camera follows the hand's motion. (3) Two women are now seated at a marble kitchen counter with three identical red boxes. They use their hands to tear open the packaging simultaneously. (4) Close-up shots show the women removing plush toys from plastic shells. They reveal white fluffy monsters holding miniature Coca-Cola bottles and cans. Large yellow and blue captions appear on screen. (5) One woman looks surprised and slightly disappointed while comparing two identical plushies. They hold multiple toys up to the camera, showcasing the 'hidden' version versus the standard ones. (6) A close-up shows a grey-furred plush toy with a Coca-Cola can attached. The women continue to smile and pose with their collection in the final scene.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 姊姊偷把我的 Labubu 冰冰箱 結果居然!?. (2) [Subtitle]: 可樂labubu. (3) [Subtitle]: 隱藏隱藏labubu. (4) [Subtitle]: 我要抽到隱藏. (5) [Subtitle]: 哦哦. (6) [Subtitle]: 玻璃可樂罐. (7) [Subtitle]: 罐裝可樂罐. (8) [Subtitle]: 可愛 而且它這個雪白色 讓人感覺像是. (9) [Subtitle]: 冰雪上有一個可樂罐. (10) [Variety]: 最後出奇蹟. (11) [Subtitle]: 隱藏 玻璃罐. (12) [Subtitle]: 這不是一個值得開心的事 我們已經有了. (13) [Subtitle]: 或者你也可以 把一個可樂扭蛋 貼在你的 labubu 上 就可以免費升級囉. (14) [Subtitle]: 真好看 可口可樂 生活快樂. (15) [Subtitle]: 最貴的可樂.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black beret and a white knit sweater; the other wears a black ruffled top and has long dark hair.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern apartment with a marble island, wooden shelves holding various collectibles (Minnie Mouse, Labubu), and warm pendant lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic female narration begins with a bright, high-pitched tone over bouncy, electronic BGM. The voice is highly animated. (2) Sound of a refrigerator handle clicking and the rustling of cardboard as a box is handled. A sharp 'ding' sound effect highlights a specific visual moment. (3) Rapid back-and-forth dialogue between two female voices. The speech rate is fast, reflecting excitement. Sounds of plastic packaging snapping open occur frequently. (4) A whimsical cartoon 'fail' sound effect plays as the speakers discuss unboxing duplicates, followed by lighthearted laughter. (5) The voices maintain high arousal through the end, concluding with a final 'whoosh' transition sound and a sharp musical cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Unboxing Action -> Result Comparison -> Closing Tip
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a collaborative blind box unboxing experience (Coca-Cola x Labubu) and share the thrill of hunting for rare figurines with the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed unboxing and close-up showcasing of the Coca-Cola branded Labubu figurines.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy unboxing video using typical social media editing styles to emphasize collectible value and brand collaboration.
